allow:
Bash(cd /Users/leogogichaishvili/UrbanCare/urbancare/src && for class in "rounded" "rounded-sm" "rounded-2xl" "rounded-3xl" "rounded-b-md" "rounded-b-none" "rounded-br-lg" "rounded-e-full" "rounded-e-none" "rounded-full" "rounded-l-lg" "rounded-l-none" "rounded-l-xl" "rounded-lg" "rounded-md" "rounded-panel" "rounded-r-full" "rounded-r-md" "rounded-r-none" "rounded-r-xl" "rounded-s-full" "rounded-s-none" "rounded-t-3xl" "rounded-t-none" "rounded-tl-sm" "rounded-tr-lg" "rounded-xl"; do
  echo "=== $class ==="
  grep -rl "$class" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" | sed 's|^|/Users/leogogichaishvili/UrbanCare/urbancare/|' | sort | uniq
done)

Bash(cd /Users/leogogichaishvili/UrbanCare/urbancare/src && for class in "rounded-\\[14px\\]" "rounded-\\[2px\\]" "rounded-t-\\[14px\\]" "rounded-t-\\[10px\\]"; do
  echo "=== $class ==="
  grep -rl "$class" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" | sed 's|^|/Users/leogogichaishvili/UrbanCare/urbancare/|' | sort | uniq
done)
